revision.text:
'''癸巳'''（みずのとみ、きし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて30番目で、前は[[壬辰]]、次は[[甲午]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は水、[[十二支]]の五行は火で、[[五行思想#相剋|相剋]]（水剋火）である。
==癸巳の年==
==癸巳の日== ===[[選日]]=== 癸巳の日は[[十方暮]]の10日目（最終日）で、[[天一天上]]の1日目である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings
revision.text: #redirect[[en:癸巳]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''癸巳'''（みずのとみ、きすいのみ、きし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの30番目で、前は[[壬辰]]、次は[[甲午]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[巳]]は陰の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（水剋火）である。
==癸巳の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って33が余る年が癸巳の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸巳の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[33年]] *[[93年]] *[[153年]] *[[213年]] *[[273年]] *[[333年]] *[[393年]] *[[453年]] *[[513年]] *[[573年]] *[[633年]] *[[693年]] *[[753年]] *[[813年]] *[[873年]] *[[933年]] *[[993年]] | *[[1053年]] *[[1113年]] *[[1173年]] *[[1233年]] *[[1293年]] *[[1353年]] *[[1413年]] *[[1473年]] *[[1533年]] *[[1593年]] *[[1653年]] *[[1713年]] *[[1773年]] *[[1833年]] *[[1893年]] *[[1953年]] | *[[2013年]] *[[2073年]] *[[2133年]] *[[2193年]] *[[2253年]] *[[2313年]] *[[2373年]] *[[2433年]] *[[2493年]] *[[2553年]] *[[2613年]] *[[2673年]] *[[2733年]] *[[2793年]] *[[2853年]] *[[2913年]] *[[2973年]] |}
==癸巳の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[4月]]が癸巳の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立夏]]から[[芒種]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸巳の日== 癸巳の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 癸巳の日は[[十方暮]]の10日目（最終日）で、[[天一天上]]の1日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとみ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:New pages]] [[Category:pages needing attribution]][[Category:癸巳]][[Category:pages needing attribution]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:癸巳]]

{{干支}} '''癸巳'''（みずのとみ、きすいのみ、きし）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの30番目で、前は[[壬辰]]、次は[[甲午]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[癸]]は陰の[[水]]、[[十二支]]の[[巳]]は陰の[[火]]で、[[五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|相剋]]（水剋火）である。
==癸巳の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って33が余る年が癸巳の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''癸巳の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[33年]] *[[93年]] *[[153年]] *[[213年]] *[[273年]] *[[333年]] *[[393年]] *[[453年]] *[[513年]] *[[573年]] *[[633年]] *[[693年]] *[[753年]] *[[813年]] *[[873年]] *[[933年]] *[[993年]] | *[[1053年]] *[[1113年]] *[[1173年]] *[[1233年]] *[[1293年]] *[[1353年]] *[[1413年]] *[[1473年]] *[[1533年]] *[[1593年]] *[[1653年]] *[[1713年]] *[[1773年]] *[[1833年]] *[[1893年]] *[[1953年]] | *[[2013年]] *[[2073年]] *[[2133年]] *[[2193年]] *[[2253年]] *[[2313年]] *[[2373年]] *[[2433年]] *[[2493年]] *[[2553年]] *[[2613年]] *[[2673年]] *[[2733年]] *[[2793年]] *[[2853年]] *[[2913年]] *[[2973年]] |}
==癸巳の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[4月]]が癸巳の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[立夏]]から[[芒種]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==癸巳の日== 癸巳の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 癸巳の日は[[十方暮]]の10日目（最終日）で、[[天一天上]]の1日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:みすのとみ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Snake-qq]] [[Category:癸巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:癸巳]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq-{{subst:MAINSPACE}}--qq]] [[Category:qq-Yin Water Snake-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[ja:癸巳]]

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Snake also known as Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=}}.
It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|qq=}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|qq=}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとみ (mizunoto-mi) ***Onyomi: きかのみ (kika-no-mi) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyesa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Water Snake== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that yields a remainder of 33 when divided by 60 is considered a Mizunotomi [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Mizunotomi''' |- ! [[:en:2013|2013 AD]] * {{ill|2073 AD|ja|2073年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2073 AD|qq=}} * {{ill|2133 AD|ja|2133年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2133 AD|qq=}} * {{ill|2193 AD|ja|2193年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2193 AD|qq=}} * {{ill|2253 AD|ja|2253年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2253 AD|qq=}} * {{ill|2313 AD|ja|2913年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2913 AD|qq=}} * {{ill|2973 AD|ja|2973年|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2973 AD|qq=}} |}
==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|qq=}}.
==Related Topics== * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|qq=}}.

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天一神}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Snake also known as Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|qq=}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|qq=}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905297]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Snake also known as Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|qq=}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|qq=|1=Ten Directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905297]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Snake also known as Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905297]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Snake also known as Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|qq=|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|qq=|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

--> ==Years of Yin Water Snake== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that yields a remainder of 33 when divided by 60 is considered a Mizunotomi [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Mizunotomi''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとみ (mizunoto-mi) ***Onyomi: きかのみ (kika-no-mi) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyesa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Water Snake== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that yields a remainder of 33 when divided by 60 is considered a Mizunotomi [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Mizunotomi''' |- ! [[:en:2013|2013 AD]] * {{ill|2073 AD|ja|2073年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2073 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2070年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|2133 AD|ja|2133年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2133 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11177}} * {{ill|2193 AD|ja|2553年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2553 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2613 AD|ja|2613年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2613 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2673 AD|ja|2673年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2673 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2733 AD|ja|2733年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2733 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2793 AD|ja|2793年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2793 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2853 AD|ja|2853年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2853 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2913 AD|ja|2913年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2913 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2973 AD|ja|2973年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2973 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}
==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Wasser-Schlange]][[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]][[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Kui-sṳ]][[ja:癸巳]][[ko:계사 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Snaak]][[vi:Quý Tỵ]][[za:Gveiqceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]][[zh-yue:癸巳]][[zh:癸巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905297]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Snake also known as Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとみ (mizunoto-mi) ***Onyomi: きかのみ (kika-no-mi) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyesa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Water Snake== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that yields a remainder of 33 when divided by 60 is considered a Mizunotomi [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Mizunotomi''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Wasser-Schlange]][[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]][[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Kui-sṳ]][[ja:癸巳]][[ko:계사 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Snaak]][[vi:Quý Tỵ]][[za:Gveiqceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]][[zh-yue:癸巳]][[zh:癸巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905297]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yin Water Snake also known as Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとみ (mizunoto-mi) ***Onyomi: きかのみ (kika-no-mi) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyesa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Water Snake== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that yields a remainder of 33 when divided by 60 is considered a Mizunotomi [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Mizunotomi''' |- ! [[:en:1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[:en:2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[:en:3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]] |- | * [[:en:AD 33|33 AD]] * [[:en:AD 93|93 AD]] * [[:en:153|153 AD]] * [[:en:213|213 AD]] * [[:en:273|273 AD]] * [[:en:333|333 AD]] * [[:en:393|393 AD]] * [[:en:993|993 AD]] | * [[:en:1053|1053 AD]] * [[:en:1113|1113 AD]] * [[:en:1173|1173 AD]] * [[:en:1233|1233 AD]] * [[:en:1293|1293 AD]] * [[:en:1353|1353 AD]] * [[:en:1413|1413 AD]] * [[:en:1473|1473 AD]] * [[:en:1533|1533 AD]] * [[:en:1593|1593 AD]] * [[:en:1653|1653 AD]] * [[:en:1713|1713 AD]] * [[:en:1773|1773 AD]] * [[:en:1833|1833 AD]] * [[:en:1893|1893 AD]] * [[:en:1953|1953 AD]] | * [[:en:2013|2013 AD]] * {{ill|2073 AD|ja|2073年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2073 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2070年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} * {{ill|2133 AD|ja|2133年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2133 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11177}} * {{ill|2193 AD|ja|2193年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2193 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22世紀|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11177}} * {{ill|2253 AD|ja|2553年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2553 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2613 AD|ja|2613年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2613 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2673 AD|ja|2673年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2673 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2733 AD|ja|2733年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2733 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2793 AD|ja|2793年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2793 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2853 AD|ja|2853年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2853 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2913 AD|ja|2913年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2913 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2973 AD|ja|2973年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2973 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}
==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
==Related Topics== * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Wasser-Schlange]][[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]][[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Kui-sṳ]][[ja:癸巳]][[ko:계사 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Snaak]][[vi:Quý Tỵ]][[za:Gveiqceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]][[zh-yue:癸巳]][[zh:癸巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905297]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Water Snake also known as Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとみ (mizunoto-mi) ***Onyomi: きかのみ (kika-no-mi) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyesa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Water Snake== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that yields a remainder of 33 when divided by 60 is considered a Mizunotomi [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Mizunotomi''' |- ! AD|ja|2913年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2913 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|2973 AD|ja|2973年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2973 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |}
==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

--> ==Years of Yin Water Snake== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that yields a remainder of 33 when divided by 60 is considered a Mizunotomi [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Mizunotomi''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Wasser-Schlange]][[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]][[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Kui-sṳ]][[ja:癸巳]][[ko:계사 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Snaak]][[vi:Quý Tỵ]][[za:Gveiqceih]][[zh_min_nan:Kùi-sū]][[zh_yue:癸巳]][[zh:癸巳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Wasser-Schlange]][[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]][[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Kui-sṳ]][[ja:癸巳]][[ko:계사 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Snaak]][[vi:Quý Tỵ]][[za:Gveiqceih]][[zh_min_nan:Kùi-sū]][[zh_yue:癸巳]][[zh:癸巳]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Waterslang (astrologie)]][[cdo:Gŭi-sê̤ṳ]][[de:Wasser-Schlange]][[en:Water Snake (Chinese zodiac)]][[fr:Serpent d'eau (astrologie)]][[hak:Kui-sṳ]][[ja:癸巳]][[ko:계사 (간지)]][[nds:Water-Snaak]][[vi:Quý Tỵ]][[za:Gveiqceih]][[zh-min-nan:Kùi-sū]][[zh-yue:癸巳]][[zh:癸巳]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q905297]] Wikidata name: Yin Water Snake [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:32, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yin Water Snake also known as Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
==Pronunciation== * English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi ***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi ***Onyomi 1: kisi ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ
<!-- == * Yin Water Snake (癸巳) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì ** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 sei3 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi: みずのとみ (mizunoto-mi) ***Onyomi: きかのみ (kika-no-mi) ***Onyomi: きび (kibi) ** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyesa ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ
--> ==Years of Yin Water Snake== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that yields a remainder of 33 when divided by 60 is considered a Mizunotomi [[:en:Year|year]]. {| class="wikitable" |+'''Year of Mizunotomi''' |- ! ==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).
