==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

==Months of Yin Water Snake== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:April|April]] is considered the Mizunotomi [[:en:Month|Month]]. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the [[:en:Solar term|Solar term]] (from [[:en:Lixia|Lixia]] to the day before [[:en:Mangzhong|Bōshu]]).
==Days of Yin Water Snake== The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows. ===Selected Day=== The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the [[:en:Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]] represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Snake also known as  Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: kisi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

==Months of Yin Water Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April}} is considered the Mizunotomi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu}}).

==Days of Yin Water Snake==
The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows.
===Selected Day===
The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Snake also known as  Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: kisi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 sei3
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi: みずのとみ (mizunoto-mi)
***Onyomi: きかのみ (kika-no-mi)
***Onyomi: きび (kibi)
** Korean (Revised Romanization): gyesa
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

-->

In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April}} is considered the Mizunotomi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu}}).

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Snake also known as  Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: kisi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

==Months of Yin Water Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April}} is considered the Mizunotomi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu}}).

==Days of Yin Water Snake==
The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows.
===Selected Day===
The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Snake also known as  Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yin Water Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April}} is considered the Mizunotomi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu}}).

==Days of Yin Water Snake==
The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows.
===Selected Day===
The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Snake also known as  Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}} represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches}} represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wu Xing|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: kisi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April}} is considered the Mizunotomi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu}}).

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Snake also known as  Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi

** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

==Months of Yin Water Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April|1=April}} is considered the Mizunotomi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu|1=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Water Snake==
The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows.
===Selected Day===
The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Snake also known as  Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Water Snake|kanji=癸巳|romaji=mizunoto mi|onyomi=kishi|p=guǐsì|w=kuei-ssu|mi=kʷeɪ̯²¹ sɨ|y=gwai2 si6|j=gwai2 si6|ci=kʷɐi siː|mc=kjwɨj si|oc-bs=kʷeʔ si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Snake also known as  Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Water Snake (癸巳)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): guǐsì
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gwai2 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Kisui-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: kisi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gisa (계사)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Quý Tỵ

==Months of Yin Water Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April|1=April}} is considered the Mizunotomi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu|1=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Water Snake==
The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows.
===Selected Day===
The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Water Snake also known as  Mizunotomi''' (癸巳) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 30th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Renchen|ja|1=Yang Water Dragon|2=ja|壬辰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Renchen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Kougo|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|甲午|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kougo|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Gui|ja|癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|lt=Mizunoto (癸)|2=ja|3=癸|4=zh|5=癸|1=Mizunoto (癸)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (癸)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents yin water, while the {{ill|Snake|ja|巳|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|2=ja|3=巳|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (巳)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|WD=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} represents yin fire, and according to the principle of {{ill|Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|lt=Mutual Destruction|lt_ja=相剋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Five Elements Theory: Mutual Destruction|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q218652}} (water overcomes fire).

==Months of Yin Water Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (when the Heavenly Stem is {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|WD=Q118|lt=April|1=April}} is considered the Mizunotomi {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|WD=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|WD=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} to the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|WD=Q1147880|lt=Bōshu|1=Mangzhong}}).

==Days of Yin Water Snake==
The selection of auspicious days for Mizunotomi is as follows.
===Selected Day===
The Mizunotomi day is the 10th (final) day of {{ill|Ten Directions|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Directions|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11405067}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Tian Yi Tianshang|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tian Yi Tianshang|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
